seoDescription: Klein ISD 2026-2027 calendar with Aug 12 first day, May 28 last day, fall break, Thanksgiving, winter break, spring break, PDF, ICS, and Google Calendar download.
pageHeading: Klein ISD Calendar 2026-2027: Holidays, Breaks & Important Dates
calendarNotes: Klein ISD starts the 2026-2027 school year on August 12, 2026 and ends on May 28, 2027. Fall Break runs October 12-16, Thanksgiving Break runs November 23-27, Winter Break runs December 21-January 1, Mid-Winter Break runs February 8-12, and Spring Break runs March 15-19. The district also publishes a Spanish version of the 2026-2027 calendar.

calendarFaqs.q: When does Klein ISD start school in 2026?
calendarFaqs.a: The first day of school is Wednesday, August 12, 2026.

calendarFaqs.q: When is Klein ISD Spring Break in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: Spring Break runs Monday, March 15 through Friday, March 19, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: When is the last day of school for Klein ISD in 2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The last day of school is Friday, May 28, 2027.

calendarFaqs.q: How many instructional days are in Klein ISD 2026-2027?
calendarFaqs.a: The Klein ISD 2026-2027 calendar includes 180 instructional days.

calendarFaqs.q: When do Klein ISD students return after Winter Break?
calendarFaqs.a: Klein ISD students return for the second semester on Wednesday, January 6, 2027, after Winter Break and the January teacher and staff workdays.

customSections.label: About Klein ISD 2026-2027 School Calendar
customSections.content:
The Klein ISD 2026-2027 school calendar is the districtwide academic calendar for Klein Independent School District families in northwest Harris County and the greater Houston area. It shows the first day of school, last day of school, semester and grading-period markers, major holidays, student holidays, teacher and staff workdays, teacher exchange days, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Mid-Winter Break, Spring Break, and end-of-year dates.

Most families use the traditional Klein ISD calendar to plan school attendance, transportation, childcare, appointments, athletics, travel, and summer activities. The district also publishes a Spanish version of the 2026-2027 calendar, and families should check campus announcements for school-specific events, testing schedules, graduation details, emergency closures, and dismissal-time changes.

This page organizes the official Klein ISD calendar into key dates, a printable PDF source, an importable calendar file, and a student-focused date list so parents can find holidays, no-school days, and break dates without searching through the full PDF.

customSections.label: Important Dates Parents Should Know
customSections.content: These Klein ISD dates are useful planning points for families because they affect student attendance, childcare, travel, transportation, and daily routines.

rows: First Day of School
August 12, 2026
First student attendance day for setting supplies, transportation, pickup routines, and before-school or after-school care.
Fall Break
October 12-16, 2026
A full school-week break families often use for childcare coverage, appointments, or short trips.
Thanksgiving Break
November 23-27, 2026
A full holiday week that can affect travel plans and family schedules.
Winter Break
December 21, 2026-January 1, 2027
The main mid-year holiday period for vacation planning and return-to-school routines.
Mid-Winter Break
February 8-12, 2027
A February break window that includes student holidays, teacher workdays, and break dates.
Spring Break
A common travel and appointment-planning week for Klein ISD families.
Last Day of School
Anchor date for summer childcare, camps, travel, and end-of-year planning.

customSections.label: Klein ISD 2026-2027 Calendar Overview
customSections.content:
The Klein ISD 2026-2027 academic calendar is organized around two semesters and four grading periods. The first semester begins with the August 12, 2026 first day of school and ends in December 2026 before Winter Break. Students return in January 2027 for the second semester, which continues through the fourth grading period and the final student day on May 28, 2027.

Families should pay special attention to dates that are not simple holiday breaks. Teacher and staff workdays, teacher exchange days, high school early dismissal notes, grading-period changes, and Mid-Winter Break can affect attendance, childcare, transportation, and campus routines. The February Mid-Winter Break window includes student no-school days and associated staff workdays, so parents should review the full date list and official Klein ISD calendar notes before making plans.

This overview is intended to help families understand the school-year structure before using the detailed date table, printable PDF, or calendar import file.

customSections.label: Klein ISD Calendar PDF vs Calendar File
customSections.content: Klein ISD families can use either the printable PDF or the calendar file depending on how they prefer to save school dates.

rows: Printable PDF
Printing, sharing, and keeping a paper copy at home
Use the official Klein ISD PDF when you want the district's published calendar layout.
Calendar File (.ics)
Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, and personal scheduling apps
Import the calendar file to save reviewed dates, but verify official updates because it is not a live district sync.
Official Calendar Page
Checking revisions, campus notes, translations, and emergency updates
Use Klein ISD as the source of record before making time-sensitive plans.

customSections.label: Calendar Verification Methodology
customSections.content:
MySchoolDates reviews the official Klein ISD calendar page and published district calendar PDF, compares key dates such as first day, last day, Fall Break, Thanksgiving Break, Winter Break, Mid-Winter Break, Spring Break, teacher and staff workdays, teacher exchange days, and early dismissal notes, then converts the reviewed records into the calendar file used on this page. The official Klein ISD calendar remains the source of record for revisions, campus-specific events, emergency closures, and same-day announcements.

For more detail, see the MySchoolDates calendar verification methodology.

customSections.label: Parent Questions About the Klein ISD Calendar
customSections.content: These parent-focused answers cover no-school days, teacher workdays, early dismissal, and schedule-change checks. They are visible page content and do not replace the official Klein ISD calendar.

rows: How many school days are in the Klein ISD 2026-2027 calendar?

Families who need an official school-day or instructional-day count should confirm it with Klein ISD because staff workdays, teacher exchange days, and calendar revisions can affect attendance totals.
When does Klein ISD winter break end?
Winter Break ends Friday, January 1, 2027. Students return after the January teacher and staff workdays, with the second semester beginning Wednesday, January 6, 2027.
Are teacher workdays student holidays?
Yes. Klein ISD lists teacher and staff workdays as student holidays or no-school days for students.
Does Klein ISD have early release days?
Klein ISD calendars may include early dismissal dates for high school students in some years. Families should check the official calendar and campus announcements for dismissal-time details.
Does Klein ISD have school tomorrow?
This page shows planned calendar dates only. For tomorrow-specific attendance, weather closures, emergency cancellations, or same-day updates, families should check official Klein ISD announcements.
Where can families find the Spanish Klein ISD calendar?
Klein ISD publishes a Spanish version of the 2026-2027 school calendar, linked as an alternate calendar on this page when available.
